title: GEEZY Balcony Planter Box Railing Flower Bridge Pot Porch Terrace Garden Decor, Anthracite
features: BALCONY RAILING PLANTER - Made of UV resistant PP with elegant smooth surface. Thick and sturdy, it is ideal house decoration for balcony fence and porch. Stylish and attractive, no doubt it will be an amazing landscape around your living space.
SCIENTIFIC DESIGN - With drainage holes at the bottom of each side, no more concerns that your potted plants will be submerged in a rainy day.
CLIPS INCLUDED - The balcony planter comes with easy to attach clips, so it cannot topple over.
SIZE - The balcony planter fits railings up to 6 cm wide. Dimensions of the planter: 39 x 26 x 24 cm.
NO TOOLS NEEDED - This planter makes gardening on the balcony easier than ever. Attaching the system to the railing is only a matter of seconds.
description: Product Description Flower Bridge Hanging Planter Pot GEEZY Bridge planter will help you create a breathtaking balcony garden in no time. Ideal for creating a green oasis at your railing and keeping your plants healthy for a long time with the conveniently integrated drainage holes! The flower bridge will fit neatly over your balcony railing, allowing you to set flowers where it wouldn't be possible with a standard pot. Balcony Railing Planter Made of UV resistant PP with a modern smooth surface. Thick and sturdy, it is an ideal house decoration for balcony fences, porch or terraces. Stylish and attractive, it will help you create a magnificent landscape around your living space. Frost-resistant pot features two separate compartments which allow the planting of different plants. Design Made of UV resistant PP with an elegantly smooth surface. Thick and sturdy, it is an ideal house decoration for balcony fences and porch. Stylish and attractive, no doubt it will be an amazing landscape around your living space. Drainage Feature Two drainage holes at the bottom of each side, no more concerns that your potted plants will be submerged on a rainy day. Clips Included This planter comes with easy to attach clips that help to avoid tipping over. The flower bridge creates a lovely atmosphere on your balcony. This fence planter pot is ideal for home or apartment use and will help you make the most of your porch or patio living space. Dimensions The balcony planters fit railings up to 6 cm wide. The oval pot measures 40 L 26 H x 24,5 cm. Details Clips Dimensions Efficient 100% Recyclable Design: Made from recycled plastic, this balcony planter contains 90% recycled materials and is 100% recyclable. Designed to fit nicely and neatly over your balcony railing allows you to plant different flower sets and a variety of fruits or vegetables. Installing the pot is super easy and doesn't require any tools. Drainage Holes This pot makes gardening on the balcony easier than ever by effortlessly attaching the system to the railing and securing it with clips included. The drainage holes at the bottom of the flower pot excess water and prevent the plant or flower root from rotting, which helps prolong the life of your precious plants. No more concerns that your potted plants will stay submerged in water on a rainy day.
